name: @chbrain/khai-engine-regulatory-focus
description: khai engine content, the regulatory-focus domain: regulatory focus as position, the persona's resting orientation toward how a goal is pursued -- gain to reach for, or loss to guard against.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Regulatory focus as position: the persona's resting orientation toward how a goal is pursued -- gain to reach for under promotion, or loss to guard against under prevention -- across strategic eagerness and vigilance.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_regulatory_focus.md) declares regulatory focus as a resting orientation toward how goals are pursued -- a gain to reach for, or a loss to guard against -- and the system-wide law makes every persona carry it beneath every pursuit.
card.issue: Two ready expressions a persona may hold: promotion (the goal held as a gain, eager strategies, sensitive to the presence or absence of gains, tolerates an error of commission for a shot at the hit) and prevention (the goal held as a loss to guard, vigilant strategies, sensitive to the presence or absence of loss, tolerates an error of omission to avoid a miss). Each is a full position file the build composes onto the anchor, so the persona gets a strategic inclination that shapes every pursuit, not a label. More expressions slot in as sibling files without moving the anchor.
card.require: Two altitudes must hold. One, the law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter ('personas carry a regulatory focus'), so the inclination holds system-wide and no persona pursues a goal on neutral method. Two, the link: each persona carries its focus under Projection. A persona may also hold a different, even contradicting, focus under Shadow; the gap between the focus shown and the focus masked is the character, not a contradiction to reject.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared, and each persona carries a focus under Projection. Whether a Projection focus and a Shadow focus cohere into a true persona is semantic, so it is taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite. The engine ships its own structural tests; the reading is guided, not gated.
card.setup: Two steps. Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give each persona its focus under Projection: one expression, which carries the anchor upward. Where a persona masks a different focus, put it under Shadow. Read it in which errors the persona works hardest to avoid; the room reads it beneath the plan, never narrates it.
